flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Northern Maine Community College fell 12% between 2006 and 2009 (36.4% → 32.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Northern Maine Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (33.3% vs 40.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northern Maine Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Northern Maine Community College rose 45% between 2021 and 2024 (440 → 638).
